business_ideas.idea: LED vodka bottle company: branded alcohol bottles with programmable LED light displays
COVID safety equipment manufacturing: pivoted to N95 masks, respirators, testing kits
Jupe: glamping/prefab living units, solar-powered tents deployable on owned land
Marathon Ranch Airbnb: luxury vacation property rental with cattle, 20 acres
Smash My Trash: franchise compacting trash for commercial/residential waste reduction
Bin Scrub: power-washing and cleaning trash cans for neighborhoods
Parcast: true crime podcast network producing daily scripted stories, 100M+ downloads

predictions.text: Blue-collar side hustles like bin cleaning can generate $10k/month personal income
Parcast demonstrates content volume and consistency beats production quality for monetization
Jupe and modular housing will disrupt traditional real estate development
